title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official CLI and server for running large language models locally with Docker-style UX and a built-in model library.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for the Ollama API; install via pip and talk to any Ollama model in a few lines.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers, published on npm.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: llama-index-integrations/llms/ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedding connectors for Ollama, enabling RAG pipelines with local models.

title: Ollama Web UI
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Lightweight interactive REPL for Ollama written in Rust, with syntax highlighting and history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app that streams responses from Ollama over its REST API.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to query Ollama models inside the editor for code explanation or generation.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a containerized service for CI pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for deploying, fine-tuning, and integrating Ollama with popular tools.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you summarize or chat with your notes using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Self-hosted Telegram bot that forwards messages to Ollama and streams replies back.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker Compose examples for CPU and GPU deployments of Ollama with optional web UI.
